value_chain_position: Restaurant-vertical payment OS — operates an integrated POS hardware + payment processing + SaaS platform for restaurants; takes a toll on every card swipe and subscription seat in the food-service stack.
relative_comps: Toast is the leading restaurant-vertical POS with 31% 3-year CAGR, 23% YoY, and 10% FCF margin on $6.4B revenue — remarkable for a vertical-SaaS/payments hybrid. Its moat is the restaurant-specific workflow depth (KDS, online ordering, payroll integration) that horizontal POS vendors cannot easily replicate. Block's Square for Restaurants is the closest threat; NCR Voyix (post-split) and Lightspeed are subscale. The AI infrastructure theme hint is a false positive — Toast is a fintech rails toll-taker, not an AI compute infrastructure name.
